overview: Medical Rejuvenation is a boutique aesthetic practice in Gladstone, Oregon specializing in non-surgical facial rejuvenation. The clinic provides personalized treatments including dermal fillers, wrinkle relaxers, radiofrequency microneedling, IPL laser therapy, weight loss solutions, hormone support, and medical-grade skincare products in a private, relaxed environment.
targetAudience: Adults seeking non-surgical aesthetic rejuvenation and cosmetic facial treatments.
